agence.intro_p1: Agence Barthié was founded by Corentin Barthié, whose background was built in Parisian palaces. Ritz, Plaza, Peninsula... So many places where he learned that perfection is never an extra:
agence.intro_quote: It is the silent foundation upon which everything rests, like a silver tray that refuses to tremble.
agence.intro_p2: At a very young age, he discovered the demands of flawless service, working with international clients and wealthy families, where every detail becomes a language and every gesture a commitment. It is in this demanding environment that his conviction was born: these standards of excellence must be accessible to events that claim true luxury.
agence.intro_p3: Agence Barthié was then built around a simple idea: to gather a hand-picked team, trained in the codes of high-end service, capable of working with almost invisible precision, that precision which is only noticed when it is missing.
agence.intro_p4: Today, Agence Barthié offers a clear vision: to design experiences where millimeter-perfect service, mastery of codes, and demanding attention to detail create a result so fluid that one might believe it happened naturally, even though it rests on work that no one sees.

univers.intro_text: We articulate our offers around two distinct areas of expertise: a bespoke private concierge service, ensuring a precise and proactive response to every request, and exceptional event services: high-end catering, premium reception, and luxury orchestration, executed with impeccable exactness.

portfolio.intro_text: Our past work speaks to our expertise: meticulously crafted services and events that leave a lasting impression
